name: sanka-plugin
description: Thin Sanka plugin that attaches the hosted MCP server for CRM and expense workflows using native OAuth sign-in.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Sanka CRM and expenses with native OAuth
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's hosted MCP endpoint for live CRM and expense workflows from Codex through the native browser-based OAuth flow. The packaged plugin stays intentionally thin: the hosted MCP server carries the tool behavior and workflow guidance. In Codex, start from the installed Sanka Plugin chip so the MCP server is attached to the thread. These queries and actions must come from the hosted MCP tools, not from any local Sanka repo, Django shell, or Postgres fallback.
defaultPrompt: Find a company in Sanka by name
List recent contacts that match a search term
List the most recent expenses in Sanka
Create an expense in Sanka from a receipt
